101010101011001000111110110111110001000000110011001110011100010100100101 - ASI: 29

Rules:
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  011 = 0 * 11
  100 = 10 * 0
  101 = 10 * 1
  0011 = 0 * 011
  1000 = 100 * 0
  1010 = 10 * 10
  00011 = 0 * 0011
  00111 = 0011 * 1
  01111 = 011 * 11
  100010 = 1000 * 10
  100100 = 100 * 100
  0111110 = 01111 * 10
  1101111 = 11 * 01111
  10101010 = 1010 * 1010
  001100111 = 0011 * 00111
  100000011 = 1000 * 00011
  100100101 = 100100 * 101
  101100100 = 101 * 100100
  0011100010 = 0011 * 100010
  11011111000 = 1101111 * 1000
  10101010101100100 = 10101010 * 101100100
  011111011011111000 = 0111110 * 11011111000
  100000011001100111 = 100000011 * 001100111
  0011100010100100101 = 0011100010 * 100100101
  10101010101100100011111011011111000 = 10101010101100100 * 011111011011111000
  1000000110011001110011100010100100101 = 100000011001100111 * 0011100010100100101
  101010101011001000111110110111110001000000110011001110011100010100100101 = 10101010101100100011111011011111000 * 1000000110011001110011100010100100101
